name: qa-executor
description: Portable QA execution plugin for Claude-compatible agents, including guarded Plane.so QA state workflow with fresh approval required when the Plane state is not Ready to Test, mandatory source test case updates or gaps for every executed case, redacted curl evidence for failed or blocked API cases, terminal Plane result comment sync without duplicate review approval sync comments, optional Notion execution reports, bridge support, and image evidence upload guidance. It uses skills/qa-executor/SKILL.md as the canonical instruction source and preserves the Codex plugin wrapper.
